subject: An armored orc warrior of the Mardu clan, mid-charge on a heavily barded warbeast mount, brandishing a curved blade against a smoky red battlefield
description: A fierce orc warrior in spiked, dark plate armor charges forward atop an armored saddlebrute mount, its head crowned with jagged horns and barding. The rider lifts a curved blade overhead, mouth open in a battle cry. The composition is action-driven and frontal, the figures looming large against a hazy red and orange backdrop suggesting smoke, dust, and the fires of a raid. Warm crimson and rust tones dominate, with cooler steel grays on the armor plates. The mood is aggressive, martial, and barbaric — a cavalry charge frozen at its most violent moment.
foreground: armored orc warrior on a horned, barded warbeast, curved blade raised
background: smoky battlefield haze in red and orange tones
emotion: ferocious battle cry, aggressive forward momentum
